miwi        2007-03-11 17:44:56 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/ftelnetd         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  fake telnet daemon (ftelnetd)
  -----------------------------
  ftelnetd is a small server faking various telnet daemons,
  logging all received logins to a file and doing more actions.
  
  WWW: http://www.corehack.org/
  
  PR:             ports/110172
  Submitted by:   Levent Kayan <levent at corehack.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1829    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/net/ftelnetd/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/ftelnetd/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-descr (new)
